title: Astronyx B&W
description: A clean black and white 16x PvP texture pack variant featuring a minimal monochrome style and polished competitive visuals.
body:
Astronyx 16x – Black & White Edition is a monochrome PvP-focused Minecraft texture pack built around a clean black, white, and grayscale visual style.

This edition reimagines many textures with a simplified high-contrast design, giving blocks, items, armor, particles, and interface elements a sharp and consistent monochrome look while keeping the core Astronyx style.

The pack includes customized block textures, reworked PvP-related items, custom particles, a transparent GUI, No Pumpkin Blur, custom sky elements, and additional visual refinements designed around the black-and-white theme.

**Features include:**
• Monochrome black & white theme
• Customized block textures
• Custom armor textures
• Transparent custom GUI
• Custom moon and sun
• No Pumpkin Blur
• Custom critical hit and sharpness particles
• Customized PvP-related items and tools
• Clean minimalistic visual style

Hope you enjoy using Astronyx 16x – Black & White Edition.
